mapper.select: SELECT NOTI_ID as notiId, RECEIVER_ID as receiverId, NOTI_TYPE as notiType, MESSAGE as message, NAV_URL as navUrl, IS_READ as isRead, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM NOTIFICATION_tbl WHERE RECEIVER_ID = #{receiverId} AND IS_READ = 'N' ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTIFICATION_tbl SET IS_READ = 'Y' WHERE NOTI_ID = #{notiId}
UPDATE NOTIFICATION_tbl SET IS_READ = 'Y' WHERE RECEIVER_ID = #{receiverId} AND IS_READ = 'N'
